package rulecoverage

func PositiveBytesBufferStringLen() string {
    ruleID := "bytes_buffer_string_len"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`len(buf.String())` instead of `buf.Len()`."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
